"Mrs.Saigol asked to get in touch with you regarding your measurements. Could you please share the measurements with us. Thank you" paraphrase this text message
"Mrs. Saigol requested to contact you regarding your measurements. Kindly provide us with the measurements. Thank you."
“As per Mrs. Saigol instructions to contact you regarding your measurements. Kindly provide us with the measurements. Thank you.”
"In accordance with Mrs. Saigol's directive to contact you regarding your measurements, please share them with us. Thank you."
"I will show these measurements to Master sb and if there is anything else required will let you know" Please edit this text message
"I will present these measurements to Master sb, and if any further requirements arise, I will inform you."
"I have already spoken to her while I was at your residence and also took her account details. I will be depositing the payment tomorrow and update you accordingly." Paraphrase this text message
"I have already communicated with her during my visit to your place and also obtained her account information. I will make the payment deposit tomorrow and keep you informed."
